title: kabah #3518
definition:
1) to quench, put out, be put out, be quenched, be extinguished
    1a) (Qal) to be quenched, be extinguished
    1b) (Piel) to quench, extinguish
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to quench, put out, be put out, be quenched, be extinguished
    1a) (Qal) to be quenched, be extinguished
    1b) (Piel) to quench, extinguish

    NASB:  to be quenched or extinguished, to go out
